info.title: MSGNS API v2
info.description: API v2 for the MSGNS application. Provides endpoints for Identity management (authentication, user profile, administration) and Products (product types).

get.summary: List AI responses for the authenticated user
get.description: Returns a paginated list of AI responses scoped to the authenticated user. Filterable by status and product type.

patch.description: Transitions an AI response from pending or edited to approved.
Stores edited content and transitions the response to edited status. Idempotent if already edited.

422.description: Validation error or invalid status transition

patch.description: Transitions an AI response from pending or edited to rejected (terminal state).

post.summary: Apply an AI response to the target platform
post.description: Transitions an approved response to applied and delegates publishing to the appropriate applier (Google Reviews, Instagram). Transactional — rolls back if publishing fails.

404.description: AI response not found or no applier for product type

get.description: Returns the active or cancelled (still-accessible) classic subscription for the authenticated user.

post.summary: Subscribe to a classic AI plan
post.description: Creates a recurring Stripe subscription for the authenticated user and grants the corresponding permission.

subscription_type_id.description: ID of the subscription type to subscribe to

402.description: Payment requires 3DS authentication — includes client_secret for Stripe.js confirmCardPayment()

409.description: User already has an active subscription

delete.description: Cancels the subscription at the end of the current period. Access is retained until period end. Permission revocation happens in BE-7 via webhook.

200.description: Subscription cancelled (access retained until period end)

get.description: Returns all prepaid balance rows with requests_remaining > 0 for the authenticated user, ordered by purchase date ascending (FIFO).
Returns all active prepaid AI packages ordered by price ascending. Public endpoint — no authentication required.

post.description: Performs a one-time Stripe charge and creates a prepaid balance for the authenticated user.

201.description: Payment succeeded — balance created and permission granted

200.description: Payment requires 3DS authentication — includes client_secret for Stripe.js confirmCardPayment()

get.description: Returns all active subscription types (classic and prepaid). Public endpoint — no authentication required.
Returns all AI system prompts configured by the authenticated user, keyed by product type.

put.summary: Upsert a user AI system prompt
put.description: Creates or updates the AI system prompt for a given product type.

400.description: Validation error — invalid product_type or missing/too-long prompt_text

delete.summary: Delete a user AI system prompt
delete.description: Removes the AI system prompt for a given product type. Returns 404 if no prompt exists.

404.description: Prompt not found for this product type

post.summary: Create a Stripe SetupIntent for saving a payment method
post.description: Creates or retrieves a Stripe customer and returns a client_secret for the SetupIntent.

400.description: Cannot delete default payment method with active subscriptions

get.summary: List payment methods for authenticated user
get.description: Returns all saved payment methods for the authenticated user.

get.summary: List active prices for a Stripe product (admin catalog proxy)
get.description: Returns the list of active prices for the given Stripe product. Admin-only. Not cached — reflects Stripe live state.

get.summary: List active Stripe products (admin catalog proxy)
get.description: Returns the list of active Stripe products with their active prices. Admin-only. Cached 5 minutes.

put.summary: Set a payment method as default

post.summary: Stripe webhook endpoint for subscription lifecycle events
post.description: Handles Stripe webhook events for subscription lifecycle sync and prepaid payment processing. Idempotent — duplicate events return already_processed.

get.description: Returns the Google Business connection status for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Removes the Google Business OAuth connection for the authenticated user.

get.summary: List pending Google Business reviews for the authenticated user
get.description: Fetches reviews that have no owner reply yet from the user's connected Google Business location. Refreshes the access token transparently when expired.

post.summary: Generate an AI reply draft for a specific Google review
post.description: Composes a prompt from the review text, star rating, product context, and user system prompt, then persists a pending AiResponse record.

403.description: Product not owned by the authenticated user

422.description: Validation error or duplicate pending response

post.summary: Assign a role to a user

get.summary: Get a single role by ID

get.description: Generates a CSV file with user data matching the provided filters.
Returns a paginated list of users with optional filtering and sorting.

delete.summary: Remove a role from a user

put.summary: Sync permissions for a role (full replace)

403.description: Forbidden — core role or insufficient permissions

422.description: Validation error — invalid permission names or format

delete.description: Cancels a pending email change for the authenticated user.

post.description: Confirms a pending email change using a token.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile information.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile information.

post.description: Logs in or registers a user using a Google ID token.
Logs in a user with email and password, returning an access token.
Logs out the authenticated user and invalidates the session.
Initiates an email change process for the authenticated user.
Sends a password reset email to the user.
Sends a verification email to the user.
Resets the user's password using a token.
Creates a new user account and returns an authentication token.
Alias for POST /identity/sign-up. Creates a new user account and returns an authentication token.
Allows an administrator to impersonate another user. The response includes tokens to switch context.
Stops the current impersonation session and returns to the admin context.
Verifies a user's email address using a token.

get.description: Returns the current user's Instagram connection status including token expiry information. Always returns 200 — the `connected` field indicates whether a connection exists.

delete.description: Removes the current user's Instagram connection and deletes the stored access token.

get.description: Searches the Google Places API for place candidates matching the query. Rate limited to 12 requests per minute per user. Results are cached for 30 minutes.

get.summary: List all products for the administration panel
get.description: Returns a paginated list of primary products across all users with filtering and sorting support for developer and backoffice roles.

parameters.name: assigned_at_from
parameters.description: Accepts date-only values or ISO-8601 datetimes with offset.

parameters.name: assigned_at_to
parameters.description: Accepts date-only values or ISO-8601 datetimes with offset.

put.summary: Configure product target URL with forward-only status transition

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all product types with optional sorting.

post.description: Creates a new product type with the provided data.

code.description: Unique code for the product type

post.description: Bulk-generates products from type/quantity pairs. Returns an Excel file by default (one sheet per model). Pass Accept: application/json for a legacy-format JSON response instead.

typeId.description: ID of the ProductType to generate

200.description: Generated products as Excel file (default) or JSON

get.description: Returns the details of a specific product type by ID.

patch.description: Partially updates a product type. Some fields are protected when the type is in use.

code.description: Unique code (protected if type is in use)

primary_model.description: Primary model (protected if type is in use)

secondary_model.description: Secondary model (protected if type is in use)

422.description: Validation error - field protected or invalid

get.description: Returns public product information by ID and password. No authentication required.

get.summary: Resolve redirection target for a product

post.summary: Register product with password and owner

post.description: Records a usage event for the specified product. Requires a valid user ID, product name, and scan timestamp.

userId.description: ID of the user triggering the usage event

productName.description: Name of the product at time of scan

scannedAt.description: ISO-8601 datetime of the scan event

422.description: Validation error — missing or malformed field; scannedAt must be a strict ISO-8601 datetime with timezone offset

post.summary: Reset a product to virgin state

422.description: Product type cannot be reset (bracelet/fancelet types)

total_products.description: Total root products for this user

get.description: Returns a paginated list of subscription types with optional filtering.

post.summary: Create a subscription type bound to a Stripe product
post.description: Creates a new subscription type from a Stripe product. Mode, billing periods, base price and stripe_price_ids are derived server-side from the Stripe catalog. EUR-only.

422.description: Domain error (Stripe product not found, mixed prices, invalid currency, duplicate binding, etc.)

get.description: Returns the full details of a subscription type by ID.

put.summary: Update mutable fields of a subscription type
put.description: Updates name, description, permission, and per-feature limits. Stripe binding (product/prices), mode, base price and billing periods are immutable after creation.

400.description: Validation error (including prohibited fields: stripe_product_id, mode, base_price_cents, billing_periods)

delete.description: Soft-deletes a subscription type. Returns 409 if active subscriptions exist.

patch.description: Flips the is_active flag for a subscription type.

200.description: Subscription type with updated active status

get.description: Returns all active, non-deleted subscription types. No authentication required.

data.description:
Base controller with global OpenAPI metadata.

This abstract class provides shared OpenAPI 3.0 documentation attributes
that apply to all API v2 endpoints. The security scheme is defined here
so that all authenticated endpoints can reference it.

package_id.description: ID of the prepaid package to purchase

balance.description: The newly created prepaid balance row

SubscriptionTypeResource.title: SubscriptionTypeResource
SubscriptionTypeResource.description: Admin-facing resource. Fields mode, billingPeriods, basePriceCents, stripePriceIds are derived server-side from the bound Stripe product and are immutable after creation.

mode.description: Derived from Stripe price type (recurring → classic, one_time → prepaid).

billingPeriods.description: Derived from Stripe prices for the bound product.

basePriceCents.description: Price in EUR minor units (cents). Derived from the primary Stripe price (monthly for recurring, one_time for prepaid).

stripePriceIds.description: Map of app-level billing period label to Stripe price id. Keys: monthly | annual | one_time.

bearerAuth.description: Enter your Sanctum access token in the format: Bearer <token>
